// Add the following constant inside the ApiConfig.Endpoints nested class,
// alongside the existing Auth and Forms entries:

public static class Endpoints
{
    public const string Auth = "/api/connect/token";
    public const string Forms = "/api/construction-projects/v1/forms";

    // --- ADD THIS LINE ---
    /// <summary>The relative path to the employees resource endpoint.</summary>
    public const string Employees = "/api/construction-projects/v1/employees";
}
